reasons: Candidate passed all three rolling market-proxy windows against uniform, home-prior, and raw-market baselines.
Supported calibration-bin governance passed after sparse high-confidence bins were kept as warnings instead of one-sample vetoes.
Promotion is limited to market-proxy status because true T-48/T-24/T-2/T-1h odds snapshots are not integrated.

next_actions: Keep the profile out of stable defaults until true horizon odds snapshots are integrated.
Replace single-temperature league calibration with validation-selected segmented calibration or isotonic/Platt-style calibration.
Add true horizon odds snapshots before claiming T-48/T-24/T-2/T-1h performance.
Add automatic promotion and rollback writeback for stable profile versions.
